chapter_title.en: Chapter 72 – Al-Zahaar (likening the wife as a mother)

text: عِدَّةٌ مِنْ أَصْحَابِنَا عَنْ سَهْلِ بْنِ زِيَادٍ عَنِ ابْنِ مَحْبُوبٍ عَنْ أَبِي حَمْزَةَ الثُّمَالِيِّ عَنْ أَبِي جَعْفَرٍ ( عليه السلام ) قَالَ سَأَلْتُهُ عَنِ الْمَمْلُوكِ أَ عَلَيْهِ ظِهَارٌ فَقَالَ نِصْفُ مَا عَلَى الْحُرِّ مِنَ الصَّوْمِ وَ لَيْسَ عَلَيْهِ كَفَّارَةٌ صَدَقَةٌ وَ لَا عِتْقٌ .

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Sahl Bin Ziyad, from Ibn Mahboub, from Abu Hamza Al Sumaly,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Ja’farasws, said, ‘I asked himasws about the owned slave, is there Zahaar upon him?’ So heasws said: ‘Half of what is upon the free, from the Fasting, and there is no expiation upon him of a charity, nor an emancipation (of a slave)’.
